description.value: You honed your negotiation skills from balancing the triad of elves, formians, and lashuntas on Castrovel. When you attempt to [[/act make-an-impression]], you can choose two non-ally targets. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your check against one target, and a –2 circumstance penalty against the other target. If you succeed against both targets, you critically succeed against both instead.
